---
name: Example Request
about: Suggest a new example or tutorial
title: '[EXAMPLE] '
labels: enhancement, example
assignees: ''
---

## Example Description
A clear and concise description of the example you'd like to see.

## Learning Objective
What specific concept or pattern should this example teach?

## Proposed Implementation
Describe how you envision this example working:

- **Agent Types**: What kind of agents are involved?
- **Pattern**: Is this sequential, parallel, hierarchical, etc.?
- **Tools**: What tools/APIs should be used?
- **Complexity**: Beginner, Intermediate, or Advanced?

## Use Case
Describe a real-world scenario where this pattern would be useful:

```
As a [role],
I want to [goal],
So that [benefit].
```

## Example Category
Where should this example go?

- [ ] Basic (01-08) - Part of tutorial progression
- [ ] Real-World - Production use case
- [ ] Advanced - Complex pattern
- [ ] Industry-Specific (Healthcare, Finance, etc.)

## Alternative Approaches
Are there other ways to demonstrate this concept?

## Priority
How important is this example?

- [ ] Critical - Core concept missing
- [ ] High - Very useful pattern
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor enhancement

## Additional Context
Add links to similar examples, documentation, or use cases here.

## Willing to Contribute
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this example
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting it

## Implementation Ideas
If you have ideas on how this could be implemented, please share:
